creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to trust_no_1 from comment #2)
> (In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #1)
> 
> Hi Guido,
> yes, now it works, thank you.
> By the way,... I had to use portmaster to recompile www/webkit-qt5 because a
> simple "make reinstall" of www/webkit-qt5 didn't work.

make reinstall could not work in this case because it reinstalls the port from the already built files, but to fix this issue the ports needed to be rebuilt.

Anyway I'm happy the problem was fixed.
